antagonists.rationale_text: Base-rates directly counter representativeness-heuristic by forcing denominator discipline when vivid resemblance is doing the work of judgment.
antagonists.source_quote: Reference Class Forecasting uses historical outcomes from similar problems to predict the current outcome, thereby incorporating statistical reality.

antagonists.rationale_text: Bayesian updating resists representativeness-heuristic by revising on evidence instead of trusting intuitive category fit.
antagonists.source_quote: Mitigating the risks of RH involves deliberately engaging System 2 thinking to police the quick judgments of System 1.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Representativeness-heuristic conflicts with base-rates when vivid similarity overrides reference-class frequency.
structured_tensions.source_quote: representativeness-heuristic conflicts with base-rates (base rates) when vivid similarity overrides reference-class frequency.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Representativeness-heuristic conflicts with regression-to-the-mean when extreme outcomes are projected as persistent.
structured_tensions.source_quote: representativeness-heuristic conflicts with regression-to-the-mean (regression to the mean) when extreme outcomes are projected as persistent.

curation_notes.summary: Preserved the clearest denominator and updating antagonists to keep the first-order surface inspectable.
donor_drops: Did not preserve broader availability and outcome-bias sprawl beyond the clearest current-vocabulary corrections.
open_questions: Law-of-large-numbers is source-real nearby, but the first-order surface is cleanest around base-rates and bayesian updating.
